channel.title: Posts on Jonas B. Skånøy
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Jonas B. Skånøy

item.title: Book review: Twilight of the Idols
item.description: In this post, I’ll review Nietzsche’s famous work Götzen-Dämmerung, better known as “Twilight of the Idols”. I will try with the best of my abilities to bring something new to the table with my take on this book and pick out the aphorisms and passages that I found fruitful and thought-provoking. Additionally, I want to see how this work fits into Nietzsche’s canon. So, without further ado, let’s begin!

item.title: Welcome to the blog
item.description: So, it’s about time for me to start blogging! I’ve been putting off the idea for quite some time now (Just wanted everything else on the site to be in order first), but finally I am doing it. I’ll for the most part make blog posts on things that interested me - that being continental philosophy -, and technologies that takes my attention. I will also be posting updates to the sites here, when that’s necessary.
